notes: Audit only — no edits applied. Strong, finance-first, technically careful chapter. Fails the 90 floor on 9 of 14 dimensions, driven by 2 blockers (dangling \ref{ch:responsible-llms} at chapter.tex:890; Integrated Gradients cited to the wrong Sundararajan paper at chapter.tex:393) plus book-wide SHAP double-derivation against ch06 (read #10) and a placeholder demo.ipynb. AUROC half of the prompt's use-before-definition hypothesis does NOT reproduce: AUROC is self-contained in ch06. citation_accuracy capped at 89 by NEEDS_EXTERNAL_VERIFICATION for 8 SSRN/CFA descriptive claims even after the misattribution fix. Book-level duplicate key wei2022emergent noted (not cited here).
